steps.title: Identify the subject and time reference
steps.content: Ann Greely is a singular subject. The phrase in the late 1800s indicates a past time period.

steps.title: Apply the constraint to the choices
steps.content: Only was combines singular form with past tense. Choices B, C, and D all fail this test: B and C use present-tense forms, D uses the plural were. That matches choice A — A is correct.
